text: A sense of curiosity animates me. The clear, modern lines of the space, the fire safety instructions on the wall, and the bold R+D mural invite contemplation  each element has been considered, arranged with intention, a celebration of research and development. The quiet, organized environment hints at endless possibilities, making me feel both grounded by the order and inspired by the promise of innovation. I feel a calm anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of discovery.
